subject: Re: Extracting PyTom coordinates with
body:
Hey Thomas,

Thanks for your response, especially sharing your command. I think I am not 
doign something weird in that step based off this.

So I think the mismatch in coordaintes may have been from a mistake on my

However, I think something is still going wrong as my scores in Napari look

something wrong with my template (also attached)?

Thank you,
Dylan
